commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] A narrow code fix is needed, but missing contributor proof and the plugin API decision make this a human-review lane rather than an automated repair-only candidate.; Needs attention: The diff still has a concrete local file boundary issue in harness plan_file handling.; Review finding: [P1] Constrain harness plan_file before reading it — internal/cli/harness.go:375-383 (sha=4c11ad4118f091992ac5d799f4eab3b6040a309f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds harness validation, harness-aware run/job evidence and compliance reports, harness job config, opt-in plugin tools, docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `harnessPlanHash` uses `plan_file` directly and reads it with `os.ReadFile`. No live command was run because this is a read-only PR review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow code fix is needed, but missing contributor proof and the plugin API decision make this a human-review lane rather than an automated repair-only candidate.

target.title: Add harness-aware run evidence
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds harness-aware evidence for `crabbox run` and `crabbox job run`: Markdown harness parsing, YAML frontmatter validation, plan/harness hashes, light grounding metadata, and local compliance reports.
- Adds `crabbox harness validate [--json] HARNESS.md` plus job config support for `harness.path` / `harness.index` defaults in `.crabbox.yaml`.
- Adds two bounded OpenClaw plugin tools behind opt-in `allowHarness: true`: `crabbox_harness_validate` and `crabbox_job_run_with_harness`.
- Documents harness usage, evidence outputs, compliance behavior, plugin schemas, and a generic Harness/Station/Reasoning Station roadmap.

## What The New Pieces Do
- `internal/cli/harness.go`: parses harness Markdown/frontmatter, rejects unknown top-level and nested frontmatter keys, computes hashes, builds grounding JSON, writes remote/local evidence, and renders compliance reports.
- `run` / `job run`: accept `--harness` and `--index none|light`; harness metadata is included in timing JSON and compliance failures can make an otherwise successful command return nonzero.
- Compliance reports: write `harness.md`, `grounding.json`, `compliance-report.md`, and `compliance-report.json` under `.crabbox/runs/<run-or-lease>/`.
- Required evidence: `require_junit` checks parsed JUnit results; `required_artifacts` matches collected evidence by artifact kind, path, basename, proof template, or JUnit result file.
- OpenClaw tools: expose only typed harness validation and harness job-run flows, reject absolute/parent-relative harness paths, and require explicit `allowHarness: true`.

## Review Fixes Included
- Fixed plugin argv order so `crabbox_harness_validate` emits `harness validate --json HARNESS.md`, matching the Go parser.
- Fixed required artifact compliance so unrelated artifacts no longer satisfy all requirements, and JUnit evidence can satisfy `required_artifacts: junit` when results were parsed.
- Fixed compliance ordering so proof artifacts are produced before harness compliance is evaluated, allowing proof evidence to be required.
- Fixed delegated-run harness compliance so delegated execution errors cannot look like a passed harness because of a zero-valued result exit code.
- Simplified job-level `harness:` config to only `path` and `index`, the values that `job run` can forward to the nested `run`; plan/scope/compliance live in the harness file.
- Fixed `--no-sync --harness` so remote grounding upload happens only after the remote workdir exists.
- Added a plugin security boundary: harness plugin paths must be safe repo-relative paths and harness tools are opt-in by default.
- Fixed docs examples so `job run` flags appear before the job name, removed stale doc markers from touched pages, and made the roadmap language generic.
- Added regression coverage for parser ordering, nested frontmatter typos, artifact matching, JUnit evidence matching, local harness evidence output/status, and rejected plugin harness paths.

## Verification / Proof
Copied local output from the final verification passes:

```text
$ go test ./internal/cli
ok  	github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/cli	45.189s

$ go test ./...
ok  	github.com/openclaw/crabbox/cmd/crabbox	1.173s
ok  	github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/cli	(cached)
ok  	github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/providers/all	1.851s
...
ok  	github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/providers/wandb	(cached)

$ npm run check
> @openclaw/crabbox-plugin@0.23.0 check
> node --check index.js && node --test index.test.js scripts/*.test.js
...
ℹ tests 63
ℹ pass 63
ℹ fail 0

$ npm run docs:check
checked 42 command docs: command surface ok
checked 139 markdown files: internal links ok
built docs site: dist/docs-site
```

Behavior proof inside the test suite:
- `TestWriteHarnessLocalEvidenceWritesFilesAndFailedMetadata` creates a harness evidence directory, verifies `harness.md`, `grounding.json`, `compliance-report.md`, and `compliance-report.json` are written, checks returned harness metadata, and confirms missing required artifacts produce a failed compliance report with the specific missing item.
- `TestBuildHarnessComplianceReportMatchesRequiredJUnitArtifact` proves parsed JUnit result files can satisfy required JUnit evidence.
- `TestHarnessValidateJSONFlagAfterPathFailsUsage` plus the plugin argv test prove the plugin now emits parser-compatible `--json` ordering.
- Plugin tests reject `/tmp/HARNESS.md` and `../HARNESS.md` before invoking Crabbox.

GitHub CI was green across Go, Plugin, Worker, Docs, and Release Check on the previous SHA; the latest plugin-boundary patch has passing local plugin/docs checks and will be watched to completion.

## Notes
- The plugin surface is additive but harness tools are opt-in through `allowHarness: true`.
- Harnesses deliberately do not add LLM judging, vector indexes, scenario databases, autonomous state machines, or a remote daemon.
target.author: zozo123

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
